summary:
The essential elements include transcription by RNA polymerase and catalysis through peptidyl transferase intrinsic to the ribosome; thus, options involving direct participation or pre-processing steps can be excluded based solely upon their role in facilitating rather than constituting primary functions of protein biosynthesis machinery. Hence, \(\boxed{\text{D}}\) does not pertain fundamentally but instead represents a preparatory step independent of ongoing active site reactions central to synthesizing new polypeptide chains internally managed efficiently once initiated properly with correct substrates already loaded appropriately beforehand. 

Therefore,\( \boxed{\text{D}} \), representing an auxiliary enzyme involved externally preceding full integration at sites where immediate action occurs post-transcriptional processing stages ensuring fidelity throughout entire cycles leading towards mature functional products emerging seamlessly thereafter under controlled conditions maintained robustly across cellular contexts universally
